testcase.name: testSubscribeToLabel
testcase.system-out: 11:12:35.198 [main] INFO com.aviation.fmc.acars.AcarsGroundStation -- Starting ACARS ground station: Test Ground Station (TEST-GS) 11:12:35.200 [main] DEBUG com.aviation.fmc.acars.AcarsGroundStation -- Station TEST-GS received OOOI_EVENT message from N123AA 11:12:35.200 [pool-70-thread-1] INFO com.aviation.fmc.acars.AcarsGroundStation -- Processing inbound OOOI_EVENT message from N123AA at station TEST-GS 11:12:35.200 [pool-70-thread-1] ERROR com.aviation.fmc.acars.OooiEventHandler -- Failed to parse OOOI message: OUT java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Invalid OOOI message format at com.aviation.fmc.acars.OooiEventHandler.parseOooiMessage(OooiEventHandler.java:91) at com.aviation.fmc.acars.OooiEventHandler.processAcarsMessage(OooiEventHandler.java:71) at com.aviation.fmc.acars.AcarsGroundStation.processOooiMessage(AcarsGroundStation.java:283) at com.aviation.fmc.acars.AcarsGroundStation.handleInboundMessage(AcarsGroundStation.java:263) at com.aviation.fmc.acars.AcarsGroundStation.processInboundMessages(AcarsGroundStation.java:248) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:572) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) 11:12:35.202 [pool-70-thread-1] DEBUG com.aviation.fmc.acars.AcarsGroundStation -- Processed OOOI event from N123AA at station TEST-GS 11:12:35.202 [main] INFO com.aviation.fmc.acars.AcarsGroundStation -- Stopped ACARS ground station: TEST-GS
